content.text:
Submitted 1 job. If a widget is visible, it polls automatically — do not call job_status or show_generations as a follow-up poll. In text-only clients, use job_status with sync:true to poll for completion.
- 9108d843-1bde-45b7-997d-3b91ea2aa04a  "Create ONE premium Instagram carousel slide in 4:5 portrait.
Style: Midnight Luxe Editorial for Limitless Club: black/charcoal graphite background, warm ivory + subtle bronze/silver accents, beautiful editorial typography, high negative space, subtle gridlines/crosshair/system marks. No photos of people. Luxurious founder-media, not hypey.
Exact visible Thai text, must be accurate:
คนไม่ได้เซฟโพสต์
เขาเซฟสไลด์
Small supporting Thai text:
คารูเซลที่ดีไม่ได้เริ่มจากดีไซน์
มันเริ่มจากโครงสร้างที่ทำให้คนอยากปัดต่อ
Include small header: LIMITLESS CLUB
Include footer handle: @jeditrinupab
Include slide number: 01 / 10
Do not add other words, fake logos, watermarks, random text, or misspell Thai."

params.prompt:

Style: Midnight Luxe Editorial for Limitless Club: black/charcoal graphite background, warm ivory + subtle bronze/silver accents, beautiful editorial typography, high negative space, subtle gridlines/crosshair/system marks. No photos of people. Luxurious founder-media, not hypey.
